name: codex-spawn-v2-evidence
doc: Codex `multi_agent_v2` custom-agent spawns (openai/codex@44918ea1, rust-v0.144.1) are a `spawn_agent` TOOL CALL inside the SAME session -- Codex has no SubagentStart/SubagentStop lifecycle for them, so the harness used to see nothing but a generic tool call. codex-spawn-evidence.ts now credits the SAME session-track store agent-evidence-record.ts already reads (agentsFreshInTrack), from PostToolUse `spawn_agent`/`{namespace}spawn_agent` alone. This scenario reuses the exact 'unblocks freshness' proof of 07-evidence-harvest-unblocks-freshness.json: a code Write is first denied by the explore+research freshness gate, two `spawn_agent` PostToolUse calls credit `agent_type=explore-codebase` (bare tool name) and `agent_type=research-expert` (namespace-prefixed `fusengine_agentsspawn_agent`, no separator -- the multi_agent_v2 namespace_tools form), and the SAME Write then advances past freshness to the next gate (Check-1 doc consultation) -- the observable, file-level proof the credit landed in the store the freshness gate actually reads. Parity (same payload, `id !== "codex"`, unaffected) is proven in the companion scenario 32b.

steps.doc: Fresh session, no evidence -> freshnessGate blocks (same as 07-evidence-harvest-unblocks-freshness.json step 1).

tool_input.content:
a
b
c
d
e
f

steps.doc: PostToolUse `spawn_agent` (bare tool name, hide_spawn_agent_metadata=false) with agent_type=explore-codebase -> credited into track-sc32.json as `subagent-explore-codebase` (handle-post.ts -> recordCodexSpawnEvidence). Silent: no stdout, exit 0 -- identical shape to a Task/Agent launch or any other classified evidence call.

PostToolUse namespace-prefixed spawn (`fusengine_agentsspawn_agent`, the namespace_tools capability form -- `tool_name.endsWith("spawn_agent")`) with agent_type=research-expert -> credited as `subagent-research-expert`. Also silent.

The SAME Write (step 1's identical payload) now clears freshnessGate -- both required agents are fresh in track-sc32.json via the two spawn_agent credits above -- and hits the NEXT gate, Check-1 doc consultation ('APEX: react documentation required'). The block moving from explore->documentation is the file-level proof the spawn_agent credit reached the SAME store agentsFreshInTrack reads.
